examples: The Riksdag, Sweden's Parliament, is debating a resolution to extend the country's Freedom of the Press Act of 1766 to the Internet and other media.
All seven other parties in the Riksdag have vowed not to rely on SD votes.
However, without support from the six Liberal MPs, the centre-right coalition would lack the necessary number of votes in the Riksdag to fend off any new proposals to shelve the legislation.
